moments.title: The Open Championship Begins
moments.blurb: Golf's 154th Open Championship tees off at Royal Birkdale Golf Club in Southport, England, running from Thursday, July 16th to Sunday, July 19th.

angles.name: Major Golf Action
angles.copy: It's golf's biggest week! The Open Championship is underway at Royal Birkdale. Who are you backing for the Claret Jug?

angles.name: Royal Birkdale Host
angles.copy: Royal Birkdale hosts The 154th Open Championship this week. Expect drama, stunning links, and world-class golf right here in England.

moments.title: Tour de France Continues
moments.blurb: The 113th edition of the Tour de France is well underway, with stages continuing daily until July 26th, after starting in Barcelona on July 4th.

angles.name: Daily Cycling Drama
angles.copy: The Tour de France is delivering daily thrills! Catch the latest action as the peloton battles across France this week.

angles.name: Who's in Yellow?
angles.copy: Who's holding the yellow jersey? The Tour de France pushes through another week of gruelling stages. Tune in for all the cycling drama!

moments.title: The Hundred Cricket Kicks Off
moments.blurb: The Hundred, England and Wales' 100-ball cricket tournament, begins its 2026 season on Tuesday, July 21st, with an opening double-header at the Kia Oval.

angles.name: Cricket is Back!
angles.copy: Get ready for fast-paced action! The Hundred returns this Tuesday with its new season. Who are you supporting?

angles.name: Welsh Fire Ready
angles.copy: Our very own Welsh Fire are preparing for The Hundred! The season kicks off next week – get behind your team!

moments.title: Latitude Festival Returns to Suffolk
moments.blurb: The Latitude Festival celebrates its 20th anniversary this year at Henham Park, Suffolk, from July 23rd to 26th, featuring headliners David Byrne, Teddy Swims, and Lewis Capaldi.

angles.name: Festival Fever
angles.copy: Latitude Festival is almost here! Henham Park will be buzzing with David Byrne, Teddy Swims, Lewis Capaldi and more from July 23rd.

angles.name: Suffolk's Big Weekend
angles.copy: Suffolk, get ready! Latitude Festival is back next week for its 20th anniversary, bringing a huge lineup to Henham Park.

moments.title: Love Island UK Continues
moments.blurb: The 13th series of Love Island UK, hosted by Maya Jama, continues daily on ITV2 and ITVX throughout the summer, having premiered on June 1st.

angles.name: Villa Drama
angles.copy: Still hooked on Love Island? The drama in the villa continues nightly on ITV2 and ITVX! What's your favourite moment this week?

angles.name: Summer of Love (Island)
angles.copy: Love Island UK is providing all the summer entertainment! Catch up on the latest couplings, dumpings, and bombshells.

moments.title: Geezer Butler's 77th Birthday
moments.blurb: Terence 'Geezer' Butler, legendary bassist and lyricist for Black Sabbath, turns 77 on July 17th.

angles.name: Rock Icon Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 77th Birthday to Black Sabbath's legendary bassist, Geezer Butler! What's your favourite Sabbath riff he penned?

moments.title: Wolfgang Flür's 79th Birthday
moments.blurb: Wolfgang Flür, the pioneering electronic percussionist of Kraftwerk, celebrates his 79th birthday on July 17th.

angles.name: Electronic Pioneer
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to Wolfgang Flür, the man who helped shape electronic music as part of Kraftwerk!

moments.title: Natasha Hamilton's 44th Birthday
moments.blurb: Natasha Hamilton, singer from the iconic noughties girl group Atomic Kitten, turns 44 on July 17th.

angles.name: Noughties Pop Queen
angles.copy: It's Natasha Hamilton's 44th birthday today! Send some love to the Atomic Kitten star. What's your favourite Atomic Kitten track?

moments.title: Luke Bryan's 50th Birthday
moments.blurb: American country music superstar Luke Bryan celebrates his 50th birthday on July 17th.

angles.name: Country Star Turns 50
angles.copy: Happy 50th Birthday to country music sensation Luke Bryan! What's your favourite song from the hitmaker?

moments.title: Carlos Santana's 79th Birthday
moments.blurb: Legendary guitarist Carlos Santana, known for his distinctive blend of rock, Latin, and blues, turns 79 on July 20th.

angles.name: Guitar Legend
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the one and only Carlos Santana! His guitar work is timeless. What's your favourite Santana track?

moments.title: Kim Carnes' 81st Birthday
moments.blurb: Singer-songwriter Kim Carnes, best known for her 1981 hit 'Bette Davis Eyes', celebrates her 81st birthday on July 20th.

angles.name: Classic Voice
angles.copy: Happy 81st Birthday to Kim Carnes, the voice behind the iconic 'Bette Davis Eyes'! Still a classic.

moments.title: Paul Cook's 70th Birthday
moments.blurb: Paul Cook, the drummer for legendary punk band The Sex Pistols, turns 70 on July 20th.

angles.name: Punk Rock Drummer
angles.copy: Happy 70th Birthday to The Sex Pistols' drummer, Paul Cook! An absolute punk rock legend.

moments.title: Jennifer Lopez's 57th Birthday
moments.blurb: Global superstar Jennifer Lopez celebrates her 57th birthday on July 24th.

angles.name: JLo's Big Day
angles.copy: Happy 57th Birthday to the one and only J.Lo! The global icon is still dominating the charts and screens.

moments.title: Lynval Golding's 75th Birthday
moments.blurb: Lynval Golding, guitarist and co-founder of the influential 2 Tone ska band The Specials, turns 75 on July 24th.

angles.name: Ska Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 75th Birthday to Lynval Golding of The Specials! What's your favourite Specials track?

moments.title: Summer School Holidays Begin
moments.blurb: School summer holidays in England and Wales are set to begin around July 22nd, with some schools already finished in Scotland.

angles.name: Freedom!
angles.copy: The school summer holidays are almost here for England and Wales, with Scotland already enjoying their break! Time for adventures!

angles.name: Family Fun
angles.copy: With summer holidays starting this week, what are your plans for keeping the kids entertained? Share your best ideas!
